(CDR)

outputs.description: The owner e-mail of current plan. ThreatZone.Limits.API_Limit The remaining/total API request limits of the current plan.
outputs.name: ThreatZone.Limits.E_Mail

outputs.description: The remaining/total concurrent analysis limits of the current plan. ThreatZone.Limits.Daily_Submission_Limit The remaining/total daily submission limits of the current plan.
outputs.name: ThreatZone.Limits.Concurrent_Limit

outputs.description: Maximum upload size for the workspace plan (MiB). ThreatZone.Plan.Allowed_Extensions List
outputs.name: ThreatZone.Plan.File_Size_Limit_MiB

outputs.description: ThreatZone.Plan.Modules List Enabled ThreatZone modules for the workspace.
outputs.name: The list of permitted file extensions for uploads.

outputs.description: Full name of the authenticated user. ThreatZone.Metadata.Workspace Workspace identifier or name associated with the account.
outputs.name: ThreatZone.Metadata.Full_Name

outputs.description: Name of the active ThreatZone plan. ThreatZone.Metadata.Plan_Status Status of the active ThreatZone plan.
outputs.name: ThreatZone.Metadata.Plan_Name
